title: APPRENTICESHIP AND TRAINING DIVISION - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES APPRENTICESHIP AND TRAINING DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Regulates apprenticeships in various jobs, partnering with businesses, labor groups, and schools to create more training and job opportunities. Apprenticeships mix hands-on work with classroom learning, and employers run the programs while paying apprentices. The division ensures these programs offer quality training and equal chances, especially for women and minorities. Some apprenticeship programs may provide financial assistance for child care. 1800 SW 1st Avenue Suite 500 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 245-3844 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 245-3844 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: NE 7th Avenue MAX Station (blue, red, and green lines), Portland Streetcar NE Grand and Hoyt, TriMet bus lines 8 and 70 (multiple stops) Services: Job Training Formats Occupation Specific Job Training Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CIVIL RIGHTS DIVISION CONSUMER REGULATION - WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION LEGAL SERVICES - TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE FOR EMPLOYERS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - CHILD CARE FOR CONSTRUCTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES
